title: PipeShare dual menu headers and Add User submenu (dbg118)
description:
PipeShare and PipeSync context menus now show separate section headers for customer vs employee actions, and admins get an Add User entry with a submenu for the usual user-creation paths.

Portal shell CSS supports submenu flyouts; explorer and planner menu builders pass submenu items through to the shared context menu component.

Who is affected: OVH private server on deploy. SaaS when Mike applies the platform version in releases.html.
changeLog: Dual section headers on PipeShare explorer and PipeSync planner context menus (customer vs employee).
Add User admin action with submenu (from prior menu work, cache-bust dbg118).
Context menu component renders nested submenu flyouts.
Explorer context menu typedef documents submenu items.
Cache bust dbg118 on portal, PipeSync, and mobile entry HTML.
